examples: We can never promise to sail anywhere in particular, because the weather might militate against it.
Several factors combined to militate against the success of our plan.
Increased costs militate against further enlargement of the buildings.
This type of misclassification of exposure could militate against detecting an association.
Although the absence of obvious imbalances or financial strains does not eliminate the risk of recession in America, it does militate against a long, deep downturn.
